message:
feat(wezterm): Cx-first get_pane_direction_with_cx + find_neighbor_pane helper (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Extends the tick 19/20 WeztermHandle Cx-first pattern to
`get_pane_direction`. Extracts the geometry-based neighbor-selection
logic into a pure helper (`find_neighbor_pane`) so the legacy and
Cx-first paths produce bit-for-bit identical neighbor decisions.

Scope:

1. crates/frankenterm-core/src/wezterm.rs (+97 src)

   a. `WeztermClient::get_pane_direction_with_cx(cx, pane_id, direction)`

      New Cx-first public entry point. Uses `get_pane_with_cx(cx)` and
      `list_panes_with_cx(cx)` (from tick 19/20) so the source pane
      lookup and full pane enumeration both respect caller Cx.

   b. `find_neighbor_pane(source_pane, all_panes, direction) -> Option<u64>`

      New file-scope pure helper extracted from the legacy
      `get_pane_direction` body. Encodes the geometry-based neighbor
      detection (edge alignment + perpendicular-axis overlap +
      minimum edge distance selection) as a pure function so both
      the legacy `get_pane_direction` and the Cx-first
      `get_pane_direction_with_cx` share identical selection logic.

   c. Legacy `get_pane_direction` body shrinks from ~110 lines to 4
      lines: fetch source + all panes, delegate to
      `find_neighbor_pane`. Preserves API and semantics.

Verification (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target):

  * cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib wezterm::: 160/160 pass
    (no new tests — covered by pre-existing list_panes_with_cx
    coverage via delegation and pre-existing get_pane_direction
    coverage via shared helper)
  * cargo clippy -p frankenterm-core --lib -D warnings: clean
  * rustfmt --check: clean

Leaves ft-xbnl0.2.3 still in_progress. WeztermHandle Cx-first
coverage now 9 of ~22 async methods (list_panes, get_pane, 6
send_text family + get_pane_direction).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
